canonicalPhaselock: bridge formalization lineage -> audit lineage / governance breadcrumbs -> publisher legibility overlays -> bounded steward / Agent Echo usability -> Developer Echo synthesis
ethicalBoundaryNotice: No governance transfer, institutional displacement, canon closure, or centralized successor authority claims.
commonsIntegrityNotice: Legibility overlays remain plural, reviewable, and non-priestly.

terms.definition: Cross-phase memory signals that preserve ordinary stewardship context.
A state where coherence becomes ordinary and usable without authority claims.
A new pathway arising from pattern differentiation under bounded constraints.
Constraint-signature-backed assurance that safety boundaries were not silently altered.
A legible shift corridor between prior and emergent stewardship configurations.
A bounded exploration path that does not authorize deployment or closure.
Escalation marker requiring additional human governance scrutiny before action.
A recommendation to preserve plural habitation and revision rather than settle prematurely.
Distributed knowledge flow prioritizing tributary plurality over singular prestige channels.
A broadly habitable, ordinary stewardship layer beyond expert-only operation.
Transfer of validated pattern fragments from one context to another under bounded constraints.
A safeguard status indicating plurality health must be defended before uplift.
A bounded forward model of possible outcomes used for reviewable guidance.
Early successor-forming pattern that is not yet authorized as settled governance.
Structured observation space for measurable state signals and anomalies.
A semi-stable stewardship layer shaped by renewal, memory, and plurality.
Flag indicating trust legibility/presentation quality has degraded and requires caution.
